title: Golden Spirits
overview: The series is about a girl named Momo who attends high school at the city of Sorasaki. However, she is secretly a member of Tsukikage, an intelligence agency that protects people. As a new member of the agency, she works alongside her colleagues including her senior Yuki and friends. Together, they work to establish peace in the city.

title: First Challenge
overview: It’s one thing to WANT to join a secret intelligence organization, but a completely different matter to pass initiation! Good luck, Momo, you’re gonna need it!

title: Moryo
overview: All Momo wants is Yuki’s approval, but her mistakes nearly botch Tsukikage’s missions! Is she really cut out for this role or will experience come with time?

title: Never Say Never Together
overview: As an apprentice, Fu owes a lot to Tsukikage, especially to Mei. How far is Fu willing push herself and what can Mei do about it?

title: Phantom Protocol
overview: Momo’s dedication to the cause negatively impacts her personal life. Meanwhile, the Moryo organization establishes a new affiliate to lure Tsukikage out into the open.

title: The Rewards of Friendship
overview: Humanity can be cruel. Two friends were torn apart and forced down divergent paths. One joined Tsukikage, and the other joined Moryo. What happens when they reunite?

title: From Hatsume with Love
overview: Theresia continues her investigation into Hatsume’s ties to Tsukikage. Hatsume attempts to rekindle her old friendship with the Moryo agent but where will this leave Goe?

title: Intelligence on Organization N
overview: Tsukikage travels to Okinawa and discovers that their contact, The Shisa, have been wiped out by the Nirai Kanai. Meanwhile, Goe bonds with a girl claiming to be a Viking.

title: Destiny Group
overview: All members of Tsukikage had mentors at some point. Yuki tells Momo the story of her own mentor, a girl known as Nagaho. Whatever happened to her?

title: No Response from Sorasaki
overview: All things must end, and that includes Moryo's reign of terror. The countdown begins while Tsukikage has a heart-to-heart. They prepare to take down Moryo once and for all.

title: Operation Gekkako
overview: It was a trap! With the traitor revealed and Tsukikage decimated, Moryo’s ambitions now stand unopposed. However, it is always the darkest before the dawn...

title: Tsukikage is Forever
overview: Project Gekkako is now up and running. With only a few remaining members of Tsukikage left, will they be able to save everyone or fail as others before them?
